business_info.name: Trekotrip
business_info.description: Embark on an unforgettable trekking adventure in the Himalayas. Experience thrilling landscapes and serene beauty with our guided trek packages.

services.name: Bali Pass Trek (6N/7D)
services.description: Embark on the Bali Pass Trek, a captivating Himalayan adventure connecting the Har Ki Dun and Yamunotri valleys.

services.name: Bhrigu Lake Trek (2N/3D)
services.description: Embark on an unforgettable trekking adventure from Gulaba village to the enchanting Bhrigu Lake.

services.name: Buran Ghati with Chandernahan
services.description: A breathtaking adventure through the pristine landscapes of the Himalayas.

services.name: Friendship Peak
services.description: Prepare for an exhilarating climb to Friendship Peak, nestled at an elevation of 5289 meters in the Pir Panjal range.

services.name: Gaumukh Tapovan
services.description: A thrilling adventure that promises breathtaking views and unforgettable experiences!

services.name: Triund Trek (1N/2D)
services.description: Embark on a thrilling adventure in Himachal Pradesh with the Triund Trek.
